title: gynochthodes celebica

side_effects: Gynochthodes celebica can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high toxicity levels. In severe cases, improper use of the plant can lead to cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat and low blood pressure, as well as neurological symptoms, including dizziness and seizures. Additionally, excessive consumption of Gynochthodes celebica can cause liver and kidney damage, as the plant's alkaloids can be toxic to these organs.
